title: Additional Bars
description: Adds a variety of new bars blocks
body:
# This mod will no longer be updated in favor of [Addity](https://modrinth.com/mod/addity) ## Additional Bars

This mod adds additional bars to the game that go along with Iron Bars! Goal of this mod is to add more options when it comes to bars blocks, because having just iron bars as option is sometimes dull. This mod adds bars block for gold, every wood type and a lot more to come! It features Horizontal Bars for every type of bars!

#### For versions before 2.2.0: This mod uses a fork of [OxidizeLib](https://github.com/Shnupbups/oxidizelib) by [Shnupbups](https://github.com/Shnupbups). The fork can be found [here](https://github.com/gamma1772/oxidizelib).
### Credits ###### [CodenameRevy](https://github.com/gamma1772) (Github) (Mod Developer) ###### [ruchom4u](https://github.com/ruchom4u) (Github) (Spanish Translations) ###### [16n1c0](https://www.curseforge.com/members/16n1c0) (CurseForge) (Spanish update) ###### [fantasyair18](https://github.com/fantasyair18) (Github) (Chinese Traditional (Taiwan) Translations) ###### [TheDirectorX](https://github.com/TheDirectorX), [BardinTheDwarf](https://github.com/BardInTheDwarf) (Github) (Russian Translations) ###### [Zijuna](https://github.com/Zijuna) (Github) (German Translations) ###### [justmonika](https://github.com/a5161655) (Github) (Simple Chinese Translations) ###### [mindy15963](https://github.com/mindy15963) (Github) (Korean Translations) ###### [WadeMason](https://github.com/WadeMason) (Github) ## License This mod is available under the MIT License ### How to compile First clone the repo and then inside that folder run the gradle build task: git clone https://github.com/CodenameRevy/additional-bars-fabric.git ./gradlew build
